display.name: The Shrine in the Moss
display.short_description: Rain beads on a half-sunken shrine at the side of the trail. The basin still runs clear, but the offering bowl seems to watch your hands.

choices.label: Wash the road dust away
choices.summary: Kneel, rinse the blood from your hands, and drink until your breathing steadies.

choices.label: Turn over the offering bowl
choices.summary: Greed is faster than prayer. The shrine answers by driving a cold shock through your fingers.
